name: Field failure report

- Harness (Claude Code / Claude Projects / bare API / other):

- Layer revision (see CHANGELOG, e.g. 4.2):

## What happened
<!-- The (sanitized) prompt/context, and what the model did. Transcript excerpts beat descriptions. -->

## What the doctrine says should have happened
<!-- Which rule or section of the layer/handover should have caught this. Quote it. -->

## Reproducibility
- [ ] Happened once
- [ ] Reproduced 2+ times
- [ ] Reproducible fixture attached / linked

## Anything else
<!-- Frequency, workarounds, whether baseline (no layer) does the same thing. A baseline comparison massively increases the report's value. -->
